title: A: doctrine ×4 + reading-map ×2 staged
action: Soạn 6 file staged (CHƯA swap — script cell 1 swap lúc execute): AGENTS/CLAUDE xưởng = giữ nguyên khối bee managed-markers hiện tại + luật xưởng mới (A2: phiên dev mở tại GỐC XƯỞNG; bảng cắt D2 làm bản đồ nhanh; ghi chú ./repo là repo git độc lập); AGENTS/CLAUDE repo = THUẦN forgent (per L8: chỉ nói về sản phẩm — trỏ docs/specs/system-overview + reading-map + backlog + handoff-contract; KHÔNG một chuỗi bee/BEE marker nào; không khối GitNexus — per A3 re-index sau); reading-map.repo = chỉ path sản phẩm (tương đối trong repo); reading-map.workshop = bản đồ xưởng (bee, history, plans, distillery, upstreams, + một dòng trỏ ./repo). Nội dung phải đọc-duyệt được tại Gate 3.

truths: AGENTS.repo.md không chứa chuỗi bee/BEE marker nào (grep sạch)
AGENTS.workshop.md giữ nguyên khối BEE markers hiện hành + luật A2 thành văn
Hai reading-map không dòng nào trỏ chéo sai bên (trừ dòng xưởng trỏ ./repo chủ đích)

artifacts.substantive: doctrine sản phẩm tự đứng: 6 câu hỏi trả lời được từ specs

key_links: Nội dung khớp bảng D2 + A2 của CONTEXT
prohibitions: KHÔNG sửa AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/reading-map hiện hành (staged only)
Không mutation nào ngoài staged dir

verify: npm test && ! grep -q 'BEE:' scripts/repo-divorce-staged/AGENTS.repo.md && ! grep -qi 'gitnexus' scripts/repo-divorce-staged/AGENTS.repo.md && grep -q 'GỐC XƯỞNG' scripts/repo-divorce-staged/AGENTS.workshop.md

trace.outcome: Staged 6 doctrine files under scripts/repo-divorce-staged/ (create-only, no swap): AGENTS.repo.md/CLAUDE.repo.md are pure product doctrine (six-questions definition of done from platform-foundations L5, pointers to specs/backlog/handoff-contract/decisions, zero bee/GitNexus strings); AGENTS.workshop.md/CLAUDE.workshop.md keep the bee managed-marker block verbatim and add A2 (dev sessions open at workshop root), the D2 cut-table quick map, and the ./repo-is-independent-git-repo note; reading-map.repo.md/reading-map.workshop.md split the current reading-map.md by D2 side, with exactly one workshop line pointing into ./repo. Verify: npm test 234/234 pass plus all 3 grep assertions true.
deviations: - Dropped the GitNexus block from both workshop-side staged files (AGENTS.workshop.md, CLAUDE.workshop.md), not only the repo-side ones. The dispatch only named the repo side as "zero GitNexus blocks (re-index happens post-split)", but CONTEXT.md Pinned Assumption A3 says the GitNexus block is removed from CLAUDE.md and re-analyzed in `./repo` after divorce — the indexed code (src/, bin/, test/) moves to `./repo`, so a stale GitNexus block referencing that code has no home at the workshop root either. Covered by CONTEXT.md's "Agent's Discretion" line (how to split the AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md blocks), not a new decision.

- Assumed README.md moves to `./repo` (referenced from AGENTS.repo.md, not from the workshop files) since it describes the product itself. D2's table does not list README.md explicitly; this is an inference for doctrine-pointer purposes only — the actual migration classification (cell repo-divorce-1, from `git ls-files`) is unaffected and can override this if it disagrees.
